response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical craftsmanship, and notable open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms with AI-first systems, and his resume omits key required experience in telemetry infrastructure, feature flagging systems, and statistical analysis for experimentation.
strengths: Proven full-stack engineering expertise across languages (TypeScript, D, C++, Java) and systems
Demonstrated technical leadership via open-source projects and knowledge sharing (workshops, frameworks)
Experience with distributed systems, real-time data, and scalable infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes, microservices)
concerns: No clear track record in designing experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or guardrails for growth systems
Lacks explicit mention of telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis for A/B testing and bias detection
Minimal evidence of cross-team influence or alignment with Product/Data Science on measurement-driven growth initiatives
